evidence.snippet: DragonPlate | Engineered Carbon Fiber Composite Sheets, Tubes and Structural Components | Made in USA

items.notes: Core business: carbon fiber composite sheets, plates, tubes, and structural parts (angle, I-beams, C-channel, hat stiffeners) sold as raw inputs for high-performance structures including UAV airframes.

evidence.snippet: DragonPlate's three tube connector systems make it easy to build carbon fiber tube structures, trusses and space frames.

items.notes: Modular tube connector systems, tangent tube mounts, and pultruded/square tube structures for building carbon fiber frames and trusses.

products_categories.notes: Also sells adhesives and Carbon Fiber Quadcopter Kits but primary business is structural composite materials.

evidence.snippet: DragonPlate | Engineered Carbon Fiber Composite Sheets, Tubes and Structural Components | Made in USA

headquarters.notes: Made in USA stated in page title; phone 315-252-2559 is a central New York area code. City/state not disclosed on fetched pages; company page (dragonplate.com/company) was skipped.

evidence.snippet: These brackets are well suited for mounting [carbon fiber tubes](/carbon-fiber-tubes) in robotic end effectors, electronic rack shelving, support plates for scientific equipment, table tops, UAVs, and many other applications.

Dragonplate works with a wide array of both commercial and military customers to develop customized carbon fiber Kevlar solutions ranging from flat panels to flame retardant tubes and I-Beams to fully custom-molded contours.

drone_supply_chain_role.notes: Sells carbon fiber composite materials and structural parts used in UAV/drone construction. Explicitly lists UAVs as an application area. Has catalog SKUs for Quadcopter Kits.

![](/Images/thumbs/0010685_05-carbon-fiber-tangent-tube-mount-3-long.jpeg)Tangent Tube Mount™
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
The **Tangent Tube Mount™** makes it easy to attach a carbon fiber tube to a plate or other flat surface. The curved portion of the mount is bonded to a carbon fiber tube, and the flat side is bonded/bolted to the plate.

readiness.notes: Active e-commerce store with hundreds of catalog SKUs, listed prices, and add-to-cart functionality. Also offers custom fabrication and CNC cutting services as a secondary offering.

unresolved_questions: Exact city and state of headquarters (ALLRed & Associates Inc.).
Whether Carbon Fiber Quadcopter Kits are complete frame kits or subassemblies.
Any NDAA Section 848/889 compliance disclosures not visible in fetched pages.

fetch_requests.reason: Company/About page would confirm headquarters city and state for ALLRed & Associates Inc., the parent company operating DragonPlate. Currently only country (USA) is inferred from phone number area code.
Product page for quadcopter kits would confirm whether DragonPlate sells complete frame kits (potential airframes category) or only raw materials/parts, and clarify drone supply chain role scope.

tagline: US-based supplier of carbon fiber and Kevlar composite structures and materials—tubes, sheets, sandwich panels, connectors, and quadcopter airframe kits. ISO-certified, production-ready inventory. NDAA and Blue UAS certification status unknown; no major defense contracts identified in public record. Primary market appears to be commercial/hobbyist drone builders and general composite fabrication rather than prime contractors.
